hero.subtitle: High-Tech Craftsmanship
hero.description: Metalwork and metal structures designed with millimetric precision. Protect and elevate your space with top-quality materials.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.description: Discover our range of high-engineering products. Designed to last, built to protect, and automated to make your life easier.

portesCorredisses.title: Sliding Doors
portesCorredisses.description: Smooth automation and robust design for residential and industrial high-traffic entrances.

automatitzacioFluida.title: Fluid Automation
automatitzacioFluida.description: High-precision motor with inertia control for smooth, bump-free and noise-free opening and closing.

materialsAltaQualitat.title: High-Quality Materials
materialsAltaQualitat.description: Corten steel, stainless steel or galvanised sheet profiles treated with anti-oxidation processes to guarantee years of durability.

seguretatIntegrada.title: Integrated Safety
seguretatIntegrada.description: Active safety photocell sensors and emergency stop system that protect users and vehicles.

dissenyPersonalitzable.title: Customisable Design
dissenyPersonalitzable.description: Various finishes, colours and infill types: bars, solid leaves, combinations or privacy screens.

portesSeccionals.title: Sectional Doors
portesSeccionals.description: Superior thermal insulation and silent vertical opening that maximises your garage space.

panellsSandvitx.title: 40mm Sandwich Panels
panellsSandvitx.description: Double galvanised steel sheet with injected polyurethane foam core for extreme thermal and acoustic insulation.

antipinsament.title: Anti-Pinch System
antipinsament.description: Exclusive design of the joints between panels that prevents any risk of finger entrapment during opening or closing.

motoritzacio.title: Silent Motorisation
motoritzacio.description: High-resistance toothed belt automation with smooth opening, emergency stop and encrypted remote control.

estanqueitat.title: Total Watertightness
estanqueitat.description: EPDM rubber seals on the entire lower, upper and lateral perimeter that block wind, rain and dust.

estructuresMetaliques.title: Metal Structures
estructuresMetaliques.description: Bespoke structural engineering. Pergolas, roofing and mezzanines designed with millimetric precision.

enginyeriaAMida.title: Tailored Engineering
enginyeriaAMida.description: Custom structural calculation for every project: pergolas, roofs, mezzanines and supports with stability guarantee.

altaResistencia.title: High Strength
altaResistencia.description: Structures welded with S275 or S355 structural steel, with anti-oxidation surface treatments and hot-dip galvanising.

acabatsPersonalitzats.title: Custom Finishes
acabatsPersonalitzats.description: Choose from Corten steel, RAL powder coating, galvanising or stainless steel to integrate the structure with your space's architecture.

muntatgeProfessional.title: Professional Assembly
muntatgeProfessional.description: Specialised industrial assembly team with cranes, certified welding and load testing before handover.

serralleriaDisseny.title: Design Metalwork
serralleriaDisseny.description: Grilles, railings and perimeter enclosures where unbreakable security meets aesthetics.

seguretatMaxima.title: Maximum Security
seguretatMaxima.description: Superior thickness steel bars, high-strength welded joints and controlled access with high-security locks.

dissenyEstetic.title: Aesthetic Design
dissenyEstetic.description: Geometric lines, organic curves or cutting-edge designs: we transform security into a piece of architectural art.

materialsRobustos.title: Robust Materials
materialsRobustos.description: Corten steel, AISI 304/316 stainless steel or galvanised sheet with anti-oxidation treatments to withstand the test of time.

mantenimentMinim.title: Minimal Maintenance
mantenimentMinim.description: Modular design and professional TIG welding that minimise wear points and facilitate future repairs.

portesBasculants.title: Up-and-Over Doors
portesBasculants.description: Classic and efficient opening for garages, combining precise counterweight mechanisms with customised aesthetics.

mecanismeContrapesos.title: Counterweight Mechanism
mecanismeContrapesos.description: Articulated arm system with individually calibrated counterweights for minimal opening and closing effort.

oberturaEficient.title: Efficient Opening
oberturaEficient.description: Design that utilises ceiling space without the need for rails or side guides, ideal for garages with limited width.

esteticaPersonalitzable.title: Customisable Aesthetics
esteticaPersonalitzable.description: Wide or narrow slats, corten steel, natural wood or lacquered sheet: close your space with your own style.

durabilitatExtrema.title: Extreme Durability
durabilitatExtrema.description: Tempered steel shafts, sealed ball bearings and anti-corrosion coatings that guarantee decades of operation.

portesPracticables.title: Side-Hinged Doors
portesPracticables.description: Elegance and functionality in swing doors, ideal for residential and pedestrian entrances with high-end automation.

automatitzacioInteligent.title: Smart Automation
automatitzacioInteligent.description: Electromechanical operators with partial opening control for pedestrians, passcode and video intercom integration.

eleganciaFunctional.title: Functional Elegance
eleganciaFunctional.description: Symmetrical design with clean lines: vertical bars, smooth leaves or combinations for a refined property image.

versatilitatAccessos.title: Access Versatility
versatilitatAccessos.description: One or two leaves, with or without integrated pedestrian door, adaptable to any width and ground slope.

acabatsPremium.title: Premium Finishes
acabatsPremium.description: Patinised corten steel, polished stainless steel, powder-coated sheet or technical wood: noble materials for a distinguished entrance.

catalog.title: Solutions Catalog
catalog.description: Explore our complete range of doors, automation and metal structures custom-designed for your project.
catalog.empty: No products available at the moment.

productDetail.featuresSubtitle: Discover the details that make the difference in every project.
productDetail.processSubtitle: From idea to reality in four professional steps.

consulta.title: Consultation & Measurement
consulta.description: We visit your site, take precise measurements and listen to your needs to define the perfect project.

enginyeria.title: Engineering & Design
enginyeria.description: Our engineering team calculates the structure, selects materials and creates blueprints with millimetric precision.

fabricacio.title: Artisan Manufacturing
fabricacio.description: In the workshop, each piece is cut, welded and finished by hand by specialised craftsmen with over 30 years of experience.

instalacio.title: Installation & Warranty
instalacio.description: Our own certified installation team assembles your project and commissions it with a full performance warranty.

productDetail.ctaTitle: We help you bring your project to life
productDetail.ctaDescription: Tell us what you need and we'll prepare a bespoke quote with no obligation.

fallback.premiumDescription: Designed for maximum durability and resistance.
fallback.customDescription: We adapt to the dimensions and needs of your space.

trust.title: Trust and Precision
trust.description: We don't just manufacture metal structures, we create lasting solutions backed by our track record and technological commitment.

items.title: Years of Experience
items.description: Three decades perfecting the art of metalwork and precision metal engineering.

items.title: Completed Projects
items.description: From residential doors to complex industrial structures, guaranteeing flawless operation.

items.title: Quality Guarantee
items.description: We use noble materials and high-end automation to offer unbreakable and secure closures.

form.name: Full name
form.successDescription: Our technical team will contact you as soon as possible to analyse your project.

info.subtitle: Let's talk about your project
info.title: We are ready to shape your idea.
info.description: From a simple query to complex structural engineering designs. Our team will advise you with no obligation.

footer.description: High-tech craftsmanship in metal structures and industrial or residential doors. We guarantee security, design and precision in every closure.
